allow: Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@ubuntupve 'qm stop 9000 2>/dev/null; true; qm rollback 9000 baseline; qm start 9000')
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Entrypoint:', d.get\('config',{}\).get\('Entrypoint'\)\); print\('Cmd:', d.get\('config',{}\).get\('Cmd'\)\)")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 1022 root@ubuntupve 'for ct in $\(pct list 2>/dev/null | tail -n+2 | awk "{print \\$1}"\); do ep=$\(grep "entrypoint" /etc/pve/lxc/$ct.conf 2>/dev/null\); name=$\(grep "hostname" /etc/pve/lxc/$ct.conf 2>/dev/null | head -1\); if echo "$name" | grep -qi "nginx"; then echo "=== CT $ct \($name\) ==="; echo "$ep"; fi; done')

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@pve1.cluster 'for ct in $\(pct list 2>/dev/null | tail -n+2 | awk "{print \\$1}"\); do name=$\(grep "hostname" /etc/pve/lxc/$ct.conf 2>/dev/null | head -1\); if echo "$name" | grep -qi "nginx"; then echo "=== CT $ct ==="; grep "entrypoint" /etc/pve/lxc/$ct.conf; fi; done')
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@pve1.cluster "pct help reboot 2>&1 | head -3; echo '---'; pct help shutdown 2>&1 | head -3")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@pve1.cluster "rm -rf production && mkdir production")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null root@192.168.1.1 "uci show dhcp | grep -E 'auth|ohnewarum'; echo ---NAT---; uci show firewall | grep -E 'dest_port.*443|src_dport.*443'")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null root@192.168.1.1 "uci show dhcp | grep -E '@domain\\[7\\]|@domain\\[11\\]'; echo ---; uci show firewall.@redirect[0]; echo; uci show firewall.@redirect[1]")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=5 root@pve1.cluster "pct list | grep -E 'nginx|zitadel|postgres'")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null root@192.168.1.1 "uci show firewall.cfg2a3837; echo; uci show firewall.cfg2b3837; echo ===TEST===; nc -zv 192.168.4.41 1443 2>&1; echo ===LISTEN===; netstat -tln 2>/dev/null | grep -E ':\(443|1443|80\)'")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null root@192.168.1.1 "wget -qO- --timeout=5 --no-check-certificate https://192.168.4.41:1443/ 2>&1 | head -5; echo ===CURL===; curl -sk --max-time 5 https://192.168.4.41:1443/ -o /dev/null -w 'code=%{http_code}\\n' 2>&1; echo ===UHTTPD===; ps w 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'uhttpd|nginx' | grep -v grep")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null root@192.168.1.1 "netstat -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep ':443 '; echo ===RULES===; iptables -t nat -L PREROUTING -n -v 2>/dev/null | grep -E '443|DNAT'; echo ===TEST443LOCAL===; curl -sk --max-time 3 https://127.0.0.1:443/ -o /dev/null -w 'code=%{http_code}\\n' 2>&1")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null root@192.168.1.1 "uci show dhcp | grep -iE 'router-kg|router_kg'; echo ===HOSTNAME===; uci show system.@system[0].hostname; echo ===IPS===; ip -4 -o addr show | awk '{print \\$2, \\$4}'")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null root@router-kg 'umask 077; TS=$\(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S\); sysupgrade -b /tmp/router-kg-backup-$TS.tar.gz && ls -la /tmp/router-kg-backup-$TS.tar.gz && echo TS=$TS')
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null root@router-kg 'uci export uhttpd; echo "---FIREWALL---"; uci export firewall; echo "---DHCP---"; uci export dhcp')

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null root@router-kg 'curl -skv --max-time 5 https://192.168.4.41:1443/ 2>&1 | head -20; echo ===PING===; ping -c 2 -W 2 192.168.4.41 2>&1 | tail -5')

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@pve1.cluster "pct exec 503 -- sh -c 'ss -tln 2>/dev/null || netstat -tln 2>/dev/null; echo ===CONFS===; ls /etc/nginx/conf.d/ 2>/dev/null; echo ===NGINX===; ps -ef | grep -v grep | grep nginx | head -3'")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@pve1.cluster "pct exec 503 -- sh -c 'ls /etc/ssl/addon/ 2>/dev/null; echo ===NGINXCONF===; cat /etc/nginx/nginx.conf 2>/dev/null | head -40; echo ===INCLUDES===; grep -rn include /etc/nginx/ 2>/dev/null | head -10'")
